title: Clarify next-task workflow
summary: Clarified next-task and task-planning workflow so common prompts are explicitly packet-aware.

user_inputs.text: Improve the manuscript skill so prompts like 'work on next task' read and execute task packets, and prompts like 'plan next tasks' create proper packet-backed tasks when needed.

agent_actions.description: Updated the local manuscript skill, task-packet workflow reference, manuscript rules, task board, dashboard, workplan, decision/user/session/Codex logs.

checks.description: skill quick_validate.py: passed; python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure; python -m json.tool manuscript/formal-object-registry.json: passed; git diff --check: passed with line-ending warnings only
